# hayao.js

> An AI-first game engine: a deterministic, headless-native simulation kernel with a
> Godot-style scene tree, pluggable renderers (SVG / Canvas / headless), and a built-in
> verification harness — designed so an LLM can author, test, and prove correct a whole
> game without ever opening a browser. Same seed, same build → same result, every run.

Install: `npm i hayao`. Import only from `@hayao`. MIT licensed.

Key invariants when writing hayao games:
- All randomness flows through `world.rng`; never `Date.now`, `Math.random`, or argless `new Date` in the sim.
- Turn-based/puzzle rules live in a pure `Puzzle<State, Move>` module; every level is machine-proven winnable.
- DOM is for menus only; pure-view scene nodes set `cosmetic = true` so they stay out of `world.hash()`.
- Verify with `npm run check`, `npm test`, `npm run verify`; assert on `world.probe()` / `world.hash()`.

## Docs

- [Operating manual for agents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/AGENTS.md): the full conventions and workflow — read this first
- [API digest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/API.md): everything importable from `@hayao`, auto-generated
- [Architecture](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): how the kernel, scene tree, and renderers fit together
- [Engine internals](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/ENGINE.md): the simulation kernel in depth
- [Conventions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md): code and project conventions for examples
- [Verification](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/VERIFICATION.md): the proof harness — solvers, bots, golden replays
- [Game-design playbook](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/FUN.md): what made the 20-genre campaign's games fun

## Examples

- [Playable gallery](https://hellojanpacan.github.io/hayao-js/): machine-verified games, one per genre, playable in the browser
- [Sokoban source](https://github.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/tree/main/examples/sokoban): the reference example — copy this to start a new game
- [All example sources](https://github.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/tree/main/examples): every game's pure logic, view, tests, and golden replay

## Optional

- [Build log](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/BUILDLOG.md): the Build-Measure-Learn campaign, game by game
- [Lessons](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/LESSONS.md): engine lessons distilled from the campaign
- [Repository](https://github.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js): source, issues, CI
